concept: Bloons TD 6 Bloons TD 6 is a tower defense game where players strategically place and upgrade monkey towers along a path to pop waves of incoming "Bloons" (balloons) before they reach the end. The game features diverse Bloon types requiring specific tower abilities, an in-game cash economy for tower purchases and upgrades, and a "Monkey Knowledge" meta-progression system providing permanent buffs.
name: Bloons TD 6
